bead.title: docs(spec): FEAT-008 AC for graph edge contrast (WCAG AA non-text)
bead.description: Add an explicit AC to FEAT-008 (web UI) requiring graph edges to meet WCAG AA non-text contrast (>=3:1) in both light and dark themes.
bead.acceptance: 1. docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-web-ui.md updated with explicit graph-edge contrast AC. 2. ddx doc audit clean for FEAT-008.
